facebook.caption: POV: you picked the dive shop locals actually use. Phu Quoc Local Guide Snorkeling and Scuba Diving sits on 94 Nguyễn Trung Trực and holds a 4.9-star rating from 66 divers. Not the flashy resort package. The real one. Coral reefs, clear water, a crew that knows every reef by name. First time underwater or certified diver, this is the spot. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
